title: 东方神域传 ~在游戏里展示威严~
description:
Kawasiro Nitori created a multiplayer online MMO game and promoted it on TV. Remlia thought this was a good opportunity for the whole Gensokyo to worship her fame without leaving her house.

Includes: main Chapter (10 chapters), side stages, special stages, challenge stages, Clearance Bonus, etc.

The last three chapters will be released as free updates after the game is released.

Each chapter contains about 5-6 main stages;

The main characters are 「the Embodiment of Scarlet Devil」; 

more characters will join as the main story progresses.

More than 30 characters can be used finally.

Cultivation includes: 

character upgrade, character talent, weapon proficiency and level, 

weapon skills, equipment .etc...

Through character cultivation, and the combination of different professional cultivation, equipped skills, etc., skill matching is carried out to finally create a hexagonal warrior

Supports two modes: [Fixed Point Addition] and [Random Point Addition]

In base , you can control the movement of characters.

The infrastructure and some subsequent gameplay will focus on the base.

In addition to basic gameplay, levels include map skills, map events, tarot card systems, etc

There will be different stages and gameplay gradually opening up with the main storyline

The official version includes some Bgm of Touhou Project:

【ハルトマンの妖怪少女】 

 【輝く針の小人族　～ Little Princess】             

【二色蓮花蝶　～ Red and White】 

 【今昔幻想郷　～ Flower Land】                      

【月時計 ～ルナ・ダイアル】

【恋色マジック】                                              

【ラクトガール ～ 少女密室】

 【少女さとり　～ 3rd eye】                             

【広有射怪鳥事　～ Till When?】 

【 佐渡の二ッ岩】                                             

【Bad Apple!!】

【風神少女】                                                     

【リバースイデオロギー -Reverse Ideology-】

And more...

 

About -Class change-, Class-change without appearance change is rasl Class-change . 

So each character will have multiple sets of professional appearances,

Please forgive the time cost.

About the developers: There are 2 menbers in total.

For the music part, there are commercial free and paid/free licenses.

Thank you for your support.
description_short: A Touhou Project SRPG game. Include： 30+PlayableUnits, 100 classes, 100+SpellCards, 100+EnemyUnits, 50+TouhouFanBgm and dozens of terrain types. Make Best Unit by combining class, talent, accessory, and tarot. U can even use SpellCards from other Units: sush as Koishi using FinalSpark
